mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tokens (user_id, refresh_token, is_revoked, is_expired, expiry_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{refreshToken}, #{isRevoked}, #{isExpired}, #{expiredDate})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, refresh_token, is_revoked, is_expired, device_info, expiry_date AS expiredDate, created_date, updated_date FROM tokens
mapper.update: UPDATE tokens SET is_revoked = true, updated_date = NOW() WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken} AND is_revoked = false
UPDATE tokens SET is_expired = true, updated_date = NOW() WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken} AND is_revoked = false
